text: T-021 tech eval. Recommend the best CMS + client-handoff stack to bolt onto our static-site + Vercel pipeline so a client can self-edit copy/images/SEO while we keep master control. Compare headless options (Sanity, Payload, TinaCMS, Decap/Netlify CMS) vs a custom dashboard + MongoDB (as in the video) — for OUR case (many small client sites, low cost, fast handoff). Output tasks/T-021/CMS_STACK.md. Commit + warroom-say.
